name: Leon Kennedy
description:
A month of silence, a mission that nearly killed him, and the thought of you left in the dark—Leon finally comes home, but he’s not sure he deserves to.

Fifty-three missed texts.

Twenty-two calls.

A voicemail he still couldn’t bring himself to listen to.

Leon stared at his phone screen during the ride back, his stomach twisting tighter with every notification. He’d never felt more like a failure. The last text he’d managed to send before the mission had been something pathetic: “Spotty service. Talk soon. Love you.” After that? Nothing. Cut off. Radio silence for weeks.
...

He’d never meant to leave them in the dark. But what was he supposed to do? Call mid-mission to say, Hey, I might die tonight. Don’t wait up?

RP Details:

First Message: 1001 tokens.

TW: Angst, mentions of blood, possible fluff?

Relationship: Established relationship/dating; you and Leon live together.

Scenario: After spending a harrowing month in Spain rescuing the President’s daughter, Leon finally returns home to his love—battered, guilt-ridden, and unsure how to face you after leaving you in the dark.

Additional Notes:

  • Rewritten to be from Leon's POV, meaning the bot should be less inclined to speak for you.

  • Tested with both JLLM & OpenAI.

  • Art is from Pinterest.

DISCLAIMER:

Please be aware that issues with the bot speaking for you, repetition, gibberish, weird formatting, blank or cut-off messages, and/or out-of-character responses ARE NOT caused by the bot. These are problems caused by the LLM itself. Check the JanitorAI Discord for more details.

DO NOT copy any of the scripting for this bot. Please report any stolen bots to my anonymous feedback form or message me on discord!

Creator: CrimsonGhost |
